title: sensor wiring live
manager: Sensors go live — external readings declared as typed, read-only, level-triggered inputs that a machine samples, with every read recorded to the input tape at commit so the run replays exactly. This is the moment a machine stops being a closed system and starts observing the world without giving up determinism: the recorded reads are the source of truth, so replaying a run never re-queries reality and gets a different answer.
cs: `sensor s : T;` read-only, level-triggered (§14); reads recorded to the input tape at commit (input source-of-truth); the wiring that makes sensors live rather than parse-only as in v6.
